With a focus on Remote Sensing, Jaume Vera has achieved notable recognition and holds a Drift Architect Approval certification. His academic journey was significantly influenced by his mentor, Kalin Borislavov, who provided essential guidance throughout his studies. Funding for his innovative research comes from the Silica Dream Initiative, which fosters advancements in the area.
